questions.objective_ref: Explain what System 1 thinking is and describe its three defining characteristics: speed, automaticity, and low effort.
Give at least two everyday examples of System 1 thinking in action.
Distinguish System 1 from System 2 thinking at a high level.
Explain what a cognitive heuristic is and why heuristics are useful.
Describe why System 1's speed and automation can sometimes produce errors.
Identify one way System 1 thinking is relevant when a person evaluates AI-generated output.
